g.text: 3. WALL THICKNESS: 4mm SOLID (ALL SIDES, NO RIBS)
4. SHELL IS OPEN ON TOP (LID CLOSES IT)
5. EXTERIOR SLIDE RAILS: 2x PARALLEL, 2mm TALL x 3mm WIDE, FULL 130mm DEPTH
6. FITTING POCKETS: 4x ⌀13.0mm BORES, THROUGH REAR WALL (4mm), FOR JG PP0408W UNIONS
7. RELEASE CAVITY: 59W x 47H x 6D mm, CENTERED ON FITTING PATTERN
8. GUIDE PIN HOLES: 2x ⌀3.0mm, 10mm DEEP FROM REAR WALL INTERIOR FACE, PRESS-FIT FOR STEEL DOWELS
9. PIVOT HOLE: ⌀5mm, THROUGH FRONT WALL ALONG X-AXIS, FOR CAM LEVER PIVOT PIN
10. PUSH ROD HOLE: ⌀5mm (ACTUAL ⌀5.5 FOR 0.25mm CLEARANCE), THROUGH FRONT WALL ALONG Y-AXIS
11. POGO PCB POCKET: 15W x 30L x 1.5D mm ON TOP FACE
12. CHAMFERS: 5mm x 45° ON ALL FOUR FRONT LEADING EDGES
